user_qa_schema.description: User Question-Answer system for collecting context to generate accurate, personalized documents
user_qa_schema.purpose: Gather user input that will enhance LangChain prompts and improve document quality

common_questions.description: Questions asked for ALL document types across all departments

questions.question: What is your company name?
questions.used_in_prompt: Replace generic 'company' references with actual name

questions.question: How many employees does your company have?
questions.used_in_prompt: Tailor processes and complexity to company size

questions.question: What is your primary SaaS product/service?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Project Management Platform, CRM Software
questions.used_in_prompt: Use relevant examples in the document

questions.question: Who are your primary customers? (B2B, B2C, or both)
What tools/systems does your {department} team use?
questions.placeholder: Select all that apply or add custom tools
questions.used_in_prompt: Include actual tools in 'Tools & Systems' section

questions.question: What specific topic should this document focus on?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Remote Work Policy, Cloud Infrastructure Setup
questions.used_in_prompt: Narrow document scope to this topic
questions.example_answer: New Employee Onboarding for Remote Workers

questions.question: Which compliance frameworks apply to your company?
questions.used_in_prompt: Include relevant compliance sections and references

questions.question: Where are your primary offices/operations located?
questions.placeholder: e.g., US (California, New York), Europe (London, Berlin)

questions.question: What tone should the document have?
questions.used_in_prompt: Adjust writing style and language complexity

questions.question: Any additional context or specific requirements?
questions.placeholder: e.g., We recently migrated to remote-first, focus on async communication
questions.used_in_prompt: Include as additional context in LangChain prompt

document_type_specific_questions.description: Questions specific to certain document types

SOP.question: Who is the owner/manager responsible for this process?
SOP.placeholder: e.g., Head of HR, VP of Engineering

SOP.question: How often is this process performed?
SOP.used_in_prompt: Affects level of detail and automation suggestions

SOP.question: What challenges or pain points exist with the current process?
SOP.placeholder: e.g., Manual steps are time-consuming, inconsistent application across teams
SOP.used_in_prompt: Address these in 'Best Practices' or 'Exceptions' sections

Policy.question: How strict should policy enforcement be?
What are the consequences for policy violations?
Policy.placeholder: e.g., Verbal warning → Written warning → Termination

Policy.question: Who can approve exceptions to this policy?
Policy.placeholder: e.g., Department Head with Legal approval

Proposal.question: What is the estimated budget for this proposal?
What is the expected timeline for implementation?
Who are the key stakeholders and decision makers?
How will success be measured?
Proposal.placeholder: e.g., Reduce onboarding time by 30%, Increase employee satisfaction to 4.5/5

Incident Report.question: What was the severity of the incident?
Incident Report.used_in_prompt: Affects detail level and urgency in report

Incident Report.question: Which systems or services were affected?
Were customers affected? If yes, how many?
Incident Report.placeholder: e.g., Yes, approximately 150 customers experienced slowness

Incident Report.question: How long did it take to resolve?

SLA.question: Who is providing the service?
SLA.placeholder: e.g., IT Support Team, Platform Engineering Team

SLA.question: What are the target response times?
SLA.placeholder: e.g., Critical: 15 min, High: 1 hour, Medium: 4 hours, Low: 1 business day

Runbook.question: What triggers the need to use this runbook?
Runbook.placeholder: e.g., Database connection errors, High CPU usage alert

Runbook.question: What access/permissions are needed to follow this runbook?
Runbook.placeholder: e.g., AWS Console access, SSH keys, Admin privileges

Runbook.question: Who should be contacted if the runbook doesn't resolve the issue?
Runbook.placeholder: e.g., Senior DevOps Engineer, Platform Team Lead

FAQ.question: Who is the primary audience for this FAQ?
FAQ.used_in_prompt: Adjust language complexity and question focus

FAQ.question: What are the most frequently asked questions? (List 3-5)
FAQ.placeholder:
1. How do I request time off?
2. What is the remote work policy?
3. Where do I find the employee handbook?
FAQ.used_in_prompt: Prioritize these questions in the FAQ

HR & People Operations.question: What HRIS (Human Resources Information System) do you use?
What is your remote work policy?
HR & People Operations.used_in_prompt: Adjust onboarding, communication, and collaboration guidance

HR & People Operations.question: What is your PTO (Paid Time Off) policy?
HR & People Operations.used_in_prompt: Include in leave management and benefits sections

Engineering & Operations.question: What is your primary tech stack?
Engineering & Operations.used_in_prompt: Use relevant examples in technical procedures

Engineering & Operations.question: How often do you deploy to production?
Engineering & Operations.used_in_prompt: Affects CI/CD and change management procedures

Engineering & Operations.question: Do you have an on-call rotation?

Sales & Customer Facing.question: What CRM system do you use?
Sales & Customer Facing.used_in_prompt: Reference in sales processes and reporting

Sales & Customer Facing.question: What is your average deal size?
Sales & Customer Facing.used_in_prompt: Affects sales cycle complexity and approval workflows

Sales & Customer Facing.question: What is your typical sales cycle length?

Security & Information Assurance.question: Which security frameworks are you certified in or working towards?
What tools do you use for security monitoring and incident response?
Security & Information Assurance.used_in_prompt: Reference in runbooks and incident procedures

Finance & Operations.question: What accounting/ERP system do you use?
Finance & Operations.used_in_prompt: Reference in financial procedures and reporting

Finance & Operations.question: What are the expense approval thresholds?

step_1_document_selection.description: User selects department and document type
step_1_document_selection.triggers: Load relevant questions based on selection

step_2_question_presentation.ui_guidance: Use progressive disclosure - show critical questions first

step_4_prompt_enhancement.method: Replace placeholders and add context sections

prompt_injection_mapping.description: How user answers enhance the LangChain prompt

examples.prompt_before: This document provides guidelines for the company...
examples.prompt_after: This document provides guidelines for TechFlow Solutions...

examples.injection: In the 'Tools & Systems Used' section, specifically mention: BambooHR (HRIS), Slack (Communication), Greenhouse (ATS)

examples.prompt_injection: Focus specifically on remote employee onboarding procedures, including virtual orientations, equipment shipping, and async communication setup.
Include sections addressing GDPR compliance (data privacy, consent) and SOC 2 requirements (access controls, data protection).

questions_asked: How many employees does your company have?
What tools/systems does your HR team use?
What is your remote work policy?
Who is the owner/manager responsible for this process?
Any additional context or specific requirements?

user_answers.q_additional_context: We recently transitioned to hybrid work and need to standardize onboarding for both remote and in-office new hires

example_complete_qa_flow.enhanced_prompt:
You are an expert technical writer specializing in SaaS company documentation.

COMPANY CONTEXT:
- Company: TechFlow Solutions
- Size: Medium (51-200 employees)
- Remote Policy: Hybrid (2-3 days in office)
- Industry: SaaS

DOCUMENT CONTEXT:
- Department: HR & People Operations
- Document Type: SOP
- Process Owner: Director of People Operations
- Specific Focus: Standardized onboarding for both remote and in-office new hires after transition to hybrid work

TOOLS TO REFERENCE:
- HRIS: BambooHR
- Communication: Slack, Zoom
- ATS: Greenhouse

TASK:
Create a comprehensive Employee Onboarding SOP for TechFlow Solutions that addresses both remote and in-office onboarding scenarios in a hybrid work environment. Include specific procedures for:
- Pre-boarding (equipment, access setup)
- Virtual vs. in-person orientation
- Hybrid team integration
- Manager check-ins (in-person and remote)

Required Sections:
[Standard SOP sections from content_sections.json]

Quality Requirements:
- Use TechFlow Solutions instead of generic company references
- Reference BambooHR, Slack, Greenhouse, and Zoom in procedures
- Address hybrid work considerations throughout
- Include examples relevant to medium-sized SaaS companies
- Professional & Friendly tone

Generate the complete document:
